ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research publication */,
  "journal_type" INTEGER /* ID of the journal type */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author associated with the publication */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution associated with the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was released */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the publication */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "is_open_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the publication is open access */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the digital file of the publication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the publication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the publication record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journal_type FOREIGN KEY ("journal_type") REFERENCES journal_types ("journal_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the institution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the institution record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the institution record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_types" (
  "journal_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal type */,
  "journal_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the journal type */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Average impact factor for publications in this journal type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the journal type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the journal type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being cited */,
  "cited_by_publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication citing it */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the citation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the citation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_by_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_by_publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the publication */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the publication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)
